Our Love Story

✿ ✦ ✿

Ek Kahani, Do Dil

Some love stories are written in the stars long before they begin on earth. Mohit and Priya are one such story — a quiet glance that turned into a lifetime, a friendship that blossomed into forever.

उनकी मुस्कान में एक दुनिया थी, और हमने उस दुनिया में घर बना लिया। "From strangers to soulmates — every moment with you is home."

Two families, one dream — to celebrate this union with all of you who have made their journey possible. Aap sab ka saath, aap sab ki dua, yahi toh hamare jeevan ki sabse badi daulat hai.

आप सब की खुशियाँ हमारी खुशियाँ हैं — आइए, हमारे इस जश्न को अपनी रौनक से सजाइए।

With blessings of both families, Mohit & Priya are ready to begin their most beautiful chapter — and they want you right there with them.
